method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: I'm deeply invested in exploring the tension between human experiences and the relentless nature of technology. Each layer I create serves to reflect how digital decay can evoke emotions and memories, transforming the mundane into something profound. My aim is to maintain a strong focal point while allowing the surrounding elements to support and enhance this narrative.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The concept of 'Echoes of Digital Decay' draws from archival visuals to highlight the traces left by technology on our lives. By utilizing high-contrast palettes with a muted counterweight, I hope to evoke a sense of nostalgia and loss amidst the chaos of digital noise.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Ruins of Broadcast" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-literal symbolism. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Ruins of Broadcast step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
